task_completion.description: Navigate to the Import Contacts wizard in SuiteCRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the SuiteCRM interface with the 'Import Contacts' wizard open (usually Step 1 or Step 2 of the import process).

task_completion.description: Select the correct CSV file for import.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file upload input field in the SuiteCRM import wizard displays 'tradeshow_leads.csv' or the path '/home/ga/Documents/tradeshow_leads.csv'.

task_completion.description: Map First Name, Last Name, Job Title, Company, and Email to their respective SuiteCRM fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field mapping step of the import wizard, the CSV columns 'First Name', 'Last Name', 'Job Title', 'Company', and 'Email' are shown mapped to the SuiteCRM fields 'First Name', 'Last Name', 'Title', 'Account Name', and 'Email Address' respectively.

task_completion.description: Map Office Phone, Mobile Phone, and all Address fields to their respective SuiteCRM fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field mapping step, 'Office Phone' and 'Mobile Phone' are mapped correctly. Additionally, 'Street Address', 'City', 'State', 'Zip Code', and 'Country' are mapped to 'Primary Address Street', 'Primary Address City', 'Primary Address State', 'Primary Address Postalcode', and 'Primary Address Country'.

task_completion.description: Map the Notes field to the Description field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field mapping step, the CSV column 'Notes' is explicitly mapped to the SuiteCRM field 'Description'.

task_completion.description: Proceed to execute the import process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the agent clicking 'Import Now' or the system displaying a loading/processing screen for the import.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly 12 contacts were successfully imported.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final import results screen displays a success message indicating that 12 records were created, or the Contacts list view shows the 12 newly imported tradeshow leads.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SuiteCRM web interface to perform the import.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the SuiteCRM application open, rather than terminal commands or API scripts executing the import.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the CSV file rather than manually creating contacts one by one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Import Contacts' wizard is used and the file upload step is visible, proving the bulk import feature was utilized.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success message.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are not open and actively being used to modify the DOM text to say '12 records created'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target CSV file is located exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/tradeshow_leads.csv'. It contains exactly 12 unique contact records. A successful import must reflect exactly 12 created records in the SuiteCRM import summary.
